title: Special Armors
body:
## Special Armors

Special Armors is a datapack that adds various Armor Customizations  
currently you can craft armor that changes color once an Armor Trim is applied
(Specifically, the Armor Trim Material is changed continuously)

There is an optional Ressourcepack available on the [Planet Minecraft](https://www.planetminecraft.com/data-pack/special-armors/) page which disables Armor equip Sounds in case the built in sound suppresion fails.

Works with:  
Iron Armor  
Gold Armor  
Chain Armor  
Diamond Armor  
Netherite Armor  
Leather Armor  
Turtle﻿ Helmet  

Works while a player is wearing it or on an Armor stand as well as Item Frames so feel free to show it off :)

You can craft each piece by combining the armor piece with Lapiz, Amethyst Shard, Redstone, Copper  
Ingot, Netherquartz, Gold Ingot, Diamond and an Emerald. Positioning is irrelevant but all these pieces are  needed.  


![Picture of the Crafting Recipe in-game as described above](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1147166546255413278/1147166575686860890/image.png)

Also makes Armor Trims craftable, sorround any armor trim with the block you need to duplicate the desired trim and put a diamond in the top middle spot. (Since some of the Blocks are used for multiple Trims the Diamond is placed in a diffrent spot (bottom middle; middle left/right; bottom left/right))
If you can't remember that don't worry all recipes added by the Data Pack will instantly show in your Recipe Book

I plan on adding Color changing Leather Armor as well as maybe some armors that have an effect more than Cosmetic :)
